mapper.sql: id, user_id, plan_name, total_days, target_days, weekly_hours, preferred_learning_mode, next_interview_date, gaps_json, plan_result_json, is_fallback, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_battle_plan_record ( user_id, plan_name, total_days, target_days, weekly_hours, preferred_learning_mode, next_interview_date, gaps_json, plan_result_json, is_fallback, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{planName}, #{totalDays}, #{targetDays}, #{weeklyHours}, #{preferredLearningMode}, #{nextInterviewDate}, #{gapsJson}, #{planResultJson}, #{fallback}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id, plan_name, total_days, target_days, weekly_hours, preferred_learning_mode, next_interview_date, is_fallback, create_time, update_time FROM job_battle_plan_record
user_id = #{userId}
AND plan_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM job_battle_plan_record WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
